title: polygala remota
intro: Polygala remota, also known as Yuzhu in traditional Chinese medicine, is a plant species belonging to the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Polygala remota is often used in combination with other herbs, and it can be found in various forms, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures.
